# EnglishGyani

> AI-powered English coaching for Indian professionals. Practice speaking, writing, corporate communication, and interviews with personalized AI feedback. Built for India: supports Hindi/Tamil, MTI (Mother Tongue Influence) drills, and real office scenarios. Free to start; Pro from ₹499/month.

Key facts:
- Product: Speaking Coach, Practice Gym (roleplay), Interview Prep, Email Course, Grammar, Vocabulary, MTI pronunciation drills
- Content: Learning hub (guides + topic pages), Business English dictionary (words with Hindi/Tamil meanings), Corporate phrasebook (professional phrases)
- Tools: Self-introduction generator, interview Q&A pages, email templates (sick leave, resignation, salary negotiation, leave request, apology to client)
- Company: EnglishGyani EdTech Pvt Ltd. India-focused; no refunds (digital product).

## Product

- [Home](https://www.englishgyani.com): Main landing and signup
- [Features](https://www.englishgyani.com/features): Product features and differentiators
- [Pricing](https://www.englishgyani.com/pricing): Plans, FAQ, refund policy summary
- [Login](https://www.englishgyani.com/login): Sign in

## Learning content

- [English Learning Hub](https://www.englishgyani.com/learn): Guides and topic pages for corporate English, Hinglish-to-English, fluency
- [Business English Dictionary](https://www.englishgyani.com/meaning): Essential business words with Hindi & Tamil meanings and pronunciation
- [Corporate Phrasebook](https://www.englishgyani.com/corporate-phrasebook): Professional phrases and usage for office communication

## Tools & templates

- [Self Introduction Generator](https://www.englishgyani.com/tools/self-introduction-generator): AI-generated self-intro for interviews
- [Why Should We Hire You](https://www.englishgyani.com/interview/why-should-we-hire-you): Interview answer guide
- [Strengths and Weaknesses](https://www.englishgyani.com/interview/strengths-and-weaknesses): Interview answer guide
- [Top 10 Interview Questions](https://www.englishgyani.com/interview/top-10-interview-questions)
- [Sick Leave Email](https://www.englishgyani.com/templates/sick-leave-email): Template and generator
- [Resignation Letter Generator](https://www.englishgyani.com/templates/resignation-letter-generator)
- [Salary Negotiation Email](https://www.englishgyani.com/templates/salary-negotiation-email)
- [Request for Leave](https://www.englishgyani.com/templates/request-for-leave)
- [Apology Letter to Client](https://www.englishgyani.com/templates/apology-letter-to-client)
